steps.title: Spot the time progression
steps.content: The passage marks two events with explicit years: 2014 and 2017. This time separation is the key signal that the transition word must express chronological sequence.

steps.title: Match to the correct transition
steps.content:
Later directly expresses chronological progression, fitting the structure of events separated by years. Instead signals contrast, For example introduces exemplification, and In other words marks restatement—none apply to a time sequence.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
